# Master Expanded Gate Ring - 3400 Ordered Gates

Status: SUPPORT GATE RING / EXPANDED ORDERED CANDIDATE / NO-RUN / NOT ACTIVE DOCTRINE
Date: 2026-05-24

Boundary: This artifact is support-only. It does not run gates, reduce gates, promote doctrine, edit ACTIVE_GUIDES, or rewrite CURRENT_TRUTH_INDEX.

Core formula:

`ORDER -> NO-RUN LOCK -> RECURSION -> SOFT BIRTH -> AUTHORITY -> SOURCE -> OBJECT -> WORDS -> ATTENTION -> FRAME -> RELATION -> RISK -> SUBSTRATE -> PROOF -> VARIATION -> RETURN -> ENOUGHNESS -> FINAL JUDGE -> CONSOLIDATOR LOCKED END`

Count proof:

- Rings: 200
- Gates per ring: 17
- Total gates: 3400

Critical keystones:

- ORDER Gate: CS-EGR-0001
- Reduction Lock / No-Run Control ring: R002, gates CS-EGR-0018 through CS-EGR-0034
- Recursion Spine ring: R003, gates CS-EGR-0035 through CS-EGR-0051
- Soft Gate Birth Room Interface ring: R004, gates CS-EGR-0052 through CS-EGR-0068
- Enoughness Decision ring: R195, gates CS-EGR-3299 through CS-EGR-3315
- CONSOLIDATOR Locked End Ring: R200, gates CS-EGR-3384 through CS-EGR-3400
